ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units in which the indicator is measured */,
  "value_thousands" REAL /* Value of the indicator in thousands */,
  "value_billions" REAL /* Value of the indicator in billions */,
  "cumulative" REAL /* Cumulative value of the indicator up to the year */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Measure of the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Current inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Current unemployment rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, Manufacturing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "sector_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sector in the country's economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sectors" (
  "indicator_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between an economic indicator and a sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the sector in the specific economic indicator */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year from which the sector started being tracked for the indicator */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year until which the sector will be tracked for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Content or data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, custom) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
